title: May 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}
'''May 19''' is the 139th day of the year (140th in leap years). There are 226 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Peter Mayhew]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Jim Ward]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Al Rio]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Claudia Karvan]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Caroline de Souza Correa]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[E. K. Johnston]] is born.
<noinclude>
[[File:EPI_TPM_poster.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] was released on 19 May, 1999.]]
</noinclude>
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode I''' '''''The Phantom Menace''''']] released worldwide.
*1999 – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] platform.
*1999 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace 3]]'' published.
*1999 – ''[[Episode I: Anakin Skywalker]]'' published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars (1998) 6|''Star Wars'' (1998) 6]] published.
*1999 – [[Vader's Quest 4|''Vader's Quest'' 4]] published.
<noinclude>
[[File:EPIII_RotS_poster.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] released on May 19, 2005.]]
</noinclude>
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode III''' '''''Revenge of the Sith''''']] released worldwide.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: No Prisoners]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' paperback published.
*[[2020]] – [[Ken Nightingall]] dies.
*2020 - [[Charles Lippincott]] dies.
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 12|''Bounty Hunters'' 12]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Lys and the Snowy Mountain Rescue / Attack of the Training Droids]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: Legacy Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent (trade paperback)]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Official Funko POP! Coloring Book]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Visual Guide]]'' to be published in the US.
<noinclude>
